name: launchpad-toolkit
description: Methodology prototype laboratory for DojoOS Launchpad pillar — AI intake, cap table, co-founder matching, investor matching, demo day prep, stage tracker, plus a dojoos-api-consumer agent that enriches skills with live DojoOS API data when endpoints are available and degrades gracefully when they are not. Dual-purpose: external CLI for founders without DojoOS + internal validation lab for productizing patterns into the DojoOS Launchpad product.
